ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "text" TEXT /* Body text of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created or last updated the content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "slug" TEXT /* SEO-friendly URL slug */,
  "publish_at" TEXT /* Scheduled publication timestamp */,
  "expiry_at" TEXT /* Content expiration timestamp */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to mark content as featured */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, blog post, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent tag ID for hierarchical tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-category mapping */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content-category mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content-category mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-tag mapping */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content-tag mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content-tag mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "content_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content version */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the content version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_views" (
  "content_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content view */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
